title: Kill Your Sin. Don't Kill Your Sense That God Isn't Done
caption:
Self-hatred and repentance look similar from the outside. They are not the same fight.

One says I did a terrible thing. The other says I am the terrible thing. Only one of those leaves room to change. Shame loops a man back to the same sin. Conviction moves him forward, out loud, to a brother who already knows and stays anyway.

You don't need a clean record to start tonight clean. Every fresh mercy makes tonight its own fight.

Kill the sin. Let Him keep working on the man.

#faith #repentance #christianman #godlyman #grace #discipleship
